arts.sum: Manchester City want a straight loan deal if they are to land Douglas Luiz from Juventus this month and hold an interest in team-mate Andrea Cambiaso with a view towards the summer.

arts.ttl: Cambiaso’s Absence Raises Questions for Juventus: Between Champions League and Transfer Market
arts.sum: Andrea Cambiaso, Juventus' versatile defender, is set to miss the crucial Champions League match against Benfica at the Allianz Stadium. This news, confirmed by coach Thiago Motta during a press conference, comes after Cambiaso was absent from the final training session before the game. arts.ttl: Juventus’ Francisco Conceição Speaks Ahead of Crucial Benfica Clash
arts.sum: Francisco Conceição, Juventus' attacking winger, addressed the media in a press conference on the eve of the crucial match against Benfica. The game, scheduled for tomorrow at the Allianz Stadium, marks the eighth and final matchday of the Champions League League Phase. arts.ttl: Danilo Bids Farewell to Juventus with Pointed Remarks
arts.sum: A day after his official departure from Juventus, Brazilian defender Danilo left Turin's Caselle airport for Brazil shortly after 10 AM. The player, who had bid farewell to the Bianconeri world with a much-discussed Instagram post yesterday, is set to join Flamengo. Before his departure, Danilo shared some final thoughts on his Juventus experience. The post Danilo Bids Farewell to Juventus with Pointed Remarks appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus and Vlahovic: A House Divided
arts.sum: The relationship between Juventus and Dusan Vlahovic has taken a dramatic turn, leaving both parties in a precarious situation. Once considered a cornerstone of the club's future, the Serbian striker now finds himself on the fringes of Thiago Motta's project, a development that could prove costly for both player and club.
